## What does this PR do?

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs / config

## Checklist
- [ ] No env var accessed without a null check
- [ ] No TypeScript `any` without an explanatory comment
- [ ] AI responses include source citations (if touching the AI layer)
- [ ] RLS not bypassed (if touching DB queries)
- [ ] Graceful degradation maintained — app works without API keys
- [ ] Tested locally
